title: Arlong Park Reveals Its Power — Part 3
scene: On pages 9–12, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The scale of Arlong’s rule becomes clearer as the fish-men dominate the island and its people.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I had a feeling you were a good-for- nothing woman.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hmph... well then that makes things easier.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If you've realized that I was only tricking you,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Then can you just give up on your treasure and my navigation skills and disappear already? You're an eyesore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What Happened!? Why'd he suddenly jump back like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No, I don't think anybody said something funny.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No way! As if a human with his hands and legs tied could ever swim.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Hey, what's the meaning of this, Nami!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: pant, and the other side of the

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I should ask you the same thing.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: A small-time crook like you who can't even let one person die,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: and be quicker next time, slowpoke.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Almost thought I was a goner...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't you get cheeky with me!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: If you get involved with me anymore than this,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I just didn't have any change of clothes,

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
